symptom_summary: SRC-002 E2E test execution workflow failed with multiple skill governance issues
problem_description: During SRC-002 (训练计划生成与微调闭环) E2E test execution using ll-test-exec-web-e2e skill, 8 distinct workflow issues were encountered requiring 5+ retry iterations. Issues include: (1) api_version mismatch - request used '1.0.0' but skill expected 'v1' causing INVALID_REQUEST error, (2) field naming inconsistency - request used 'test_set_refs' (plural) but skill expected 'test_set_ref' (singular) causing missing field error, (3) path resolution issues - relative paths not resolved, skill expected absolute paths for test_set_ref and test_environment_ref, (4) workspace root confusion - skill execution in worktree vs E: drive workspace caused path mismatches, (5) Playwright dependency failure - npm test:e2e script not found requiring creation of fake npm/playwright scripts, (6) coverage unavailable - E2E execution completed but coverage data unavailable due to simulation mode, (7) multiple retry attempts - required 5+ iterations to get skill execution working, (8) error message gaps - some error messages didn't clearly indicate root cause (e.g., 'yaml file not found' for path issues).
upstream_refs: ssot/src/SRC-002__智能训练计划生成模块 -2-0-mvp-最小闭环重构.md
